title: Dataset Model: PDS, Members & Catalogs
description: Enumerate catalog entries and dataset attributes. Map the storage namespace and trust-sensitive datasets.

steps.title: Enter ISPF Option 3 (Utilities)
steps.screen:
ISPF Primary Option Menu
Option ===> 3

3  Utilities

F1=Help  F3=Exit
steps.hint: Type 3 at the ISPF Primary Menu and press Enter.

steps.title: Dataset List (Option 4)
steps.screen:
ISPF Utility Menu
Option ===> 4

1  Library
2  Dataset
3  Move/Copy
4  DSLIST
5  Reset
6  Hardcopy

F1=Help  F3=Exit
steps.hint: Type 4 to list datasets by pattern.

steps.title: List SYS1 Datasets
steps.screen:
DSLIST - Data Sets Matching SYS1.*

Dataset Name          Org  Recfm Lrecl Blksz
SYS1.BRODCAST         DA   FB    129   6450
SYS1.LINKLIB          PO   U     0     32760
SYS1.LPALIB           PO   U     0     32760
SYS1.NUCLEUS          PO   U     0     32760
SYS1.PARMLIB          PO   FB    80    3120
SYS1.PROCLIB          PO   FB    80    3120

Command ===>
steps.expected: Identify critical system datasets: PARMLIB, PROCLIB, LINKLIB.
steps.hint: Enter SYS1.* as the dataset pattern to list system datasets.

steps.title: Browse SYS1.PARMLIB
steps.screen:
BROWSE  SYS1.PARMLIB

Name     Prompt   Size  Created
IEASYS00          15   1999/01/01
IEASYM00          8    1999/01/01
SMFPRM00          22   1999/01/01
IKJTSO00          31   1999/01/01

Command ===>
steps.expected: SYS1.PARMLIB is a PDS containing system configuration members.
steps.hint: PARMLIB controls IPL parameters, SMF settings, and TSO configuration.

steps.title: View IEASYS00
steps.screen:
BROWSE  SYS1.PARMLIB(IEASYS00)

NUCLST=00,
PAGE=(SYS1.PAGEDUMP),
SMF=00,
SYS=00,
CONSOLE=00,
COMMND=00

*** Bottom of Data ***
steps.expected: IEASYS00 defines the IPL system parameters.
steps.hint: This member is read at IPL time — modifying it changes system behavior.

steps.title: Catalog Structure
steps.screen:
ISMF - Interactive Storage Management Facility

Master Catalog: SYS1.MASTER.ICFCAT
User Catalogs:
  UCAT.HERC01
  UCAT.WORK

All datasets are cataloged here for name resolution.
steps.hint: The master catalog is the root of all dataset name resolution on z/OS.

steps.title: Lab Complete
steps.screen:
Dataset Model Lab Complete

Key concepts:
- PDS = Partitioned Dataset (library with members)
- PDSE = Extended PDS
- SYS1.PARMLIB controls system config
- ICF Catalog resolves all dataset names
- Trust-sensitive: PARMLIB, PROCLIB, LINKLIB
steps.expected: Map the storage namespace and identify trust-sensitive datasets.
steps.hint: An attacker with write access to PARMLIB or PROCLIB owns the system.
